mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice_reply (reply_no, notice_no, reply_text, replyer) VALUES (reply_seq.NEXTVAL, #{noticeNo}, #{replyText}, #{replyer})
mapper.select: SELECT reply_no, notice_no, reply_text, replyer, reg_date, update_date FROM notice_reply WHERE notice_no = #{noticeNo} ORDER BY reply_no ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE notice_reply SET reply_text = #{replyText}, update_date = SYSDATE WHERE reply_no = #{replyNo}
